Addison
Bugas

Geospatial Analysis · Cartography · Conservation

As a recent UC Berkeley graduate, I bring strong experience in GIS and remote sensing, supported by an honors thesis that used satellite imagery to analyze invasive species expansion in the Sacramento–San Joaquin Delta. I am passionate about leveraging geospatial data to address climate challenges and inform more sustainable, resilient, and equitable environmental and infrastructure solutions.

View my work

About me

Mapping the
natural world

I'm a recent UC Berkeley graduate (Rausser College Honors Program, GPA 3.9), having earned a B.S. in Conservation and Resource Studies with a Geospatial Information Science & Technology minor in May 2026. My work sits at the intersection of environmental science, spatial analysis, and policy.

My honors research used satellite imagery and GIS to analyze climate and land-use-driven change in the Sacramento–San Joaquin Delta — processing multi-temporal imagery in ArcGIS Pro to identify landscape patterns and environmental trends.

At WWF, I designed interactive StoryMaps and geospatial dashboards to communicate conservation data to global stakeholders. I am drawn to roles where spatial thinking unlocks insight that other methods miss.

Work gallery

Maps & analyses

Spatial Analysis · Historical Cartography · ArcGIS Pro

Cholera Death Cases Relative to Water Pumps

A two-part georeferenced study of John Snow's landmark 1854 Soho, London map. The first map plots individual cholera deaths and marks water pump locations across the district. The second applies the Thiessen polygons tool to divide the area into proximity zones for each pump — isolating the Broad Street pump as the likely catalyst of the outbreak and demonstrating how spatial analysis can reveal epidemiological patterns invisible in tabular data.

ArcGIS Pro Georeferencing Thiessen Polygons Spatial Analysis Cartographic Design
Map 01
Georeferenced point map — cholera deaths and pump locations
Map 02
Thiessen polygon analysis — deaths summarized by pump catchment
